history.subject: Nonconstant map to Proj Z[X0,X1] exists for every AJC curve: gate N9a discharged. A rational function 1/pi with a pole (chart height lower bound gives a non-generic point) is regular on an open locus L(t) carrying a canonical glued section; L(t) and L(1/t) cover C by the valuative dichotomy, which descends along the faithfully flat stalk map from the DVR stalks of C x_k kbar (localRing_dvr_of_codim_one over the algebraic closure + Ideal.comap_map_eq_self_of_faithfullyFlat), removing the perfect-field restriction; the two chart morphisms X0->1,X1->t and X0->1/t,X1->1 agree on the overlap through D+(X0X1) by the homogeneous swap identity and glue to C -> Proj Z[X0,X1], separating the generic point (in D+(X0)) from the pole (not in it). HasFiniteMapToP1 is now unconditional for AJC curves; axioms clean.
ℙ¹ chart ring: Γ(V₀) is k-spanned by powers of x=X₁/X₀ (char-free base change)
docs: record ℙ¹ chart route step 2 (Γ(V₀)=k[x]) as landed; note remaining y-chart/overlap/assembly and the RingHom.comp X-index elaboration pitfall

Scope the last genus-finiteness gates: prove the Ext infrastructure of the constant-k sheaf category (Grothendieck abelian ⟹ enough injectives ⟹ HasExt.{u},{u+1}), drop the two HasExt gates from the N12 consumable, and pin the sole remaining gap to affine Serre vanishing / the 2-cover Čech comparison in that apparatus
Γ(V₁)=k[y]: the y-chart span core and base change for ℙ¹
χ-ledger: one-point equality χ(D+P)=χ(D)+deg P via residue-map surjectivity, and the effective-divisor telescope
χ-ledger telescope: one-point-bump coordinate lemmas discharging chi_add_eq_residueDeg per step
Harvest separatedness + Pic⁰ finite-type/tangent-space helpers from FGA PR #1
ℙ¹ chart overlap = D(x)=D(y): the Proj-side basic-open identity and its toProjInt pullback

Register CechComparisonGate: proves the constant-k sheaf category is Grothendieck-abelian hence has enough injectives hence HasExt.{u}/{u+1}, discharging 2 of the 3 genus-finiteness gates. Module.Finite k H^1(C,O_C) now reduces to exactly two instances: P1HasLaurentChartData k and HasCechToHModuleIso for the 2-affine cover (module_finite_hModule_one_of_finiteMapToP1_of_cechGate). Full build green (8686 jobs).
